data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending an SMS/email blast with the message '50% off tomorrow 2pm - first to book!', but the evidence does not confirm that this specific message is generated and sent by the system. While the linked use case describes a similar scenario, it mentions a different message ('Flash Sale: $150 for tomorrow 2pm portrait session. First to book gets it!'), indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of evidence showing the exact message being sent leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of the system sending the exact SMS/email blast message as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
